a: Pragati Sahayak local Indian businesses ke liye premium websites, WhatsApp lead systems, Google profile improvement, SEO-ready content and booking-ready digital systems banata hai.

q: Local business ko website kyu chahiye?
a: Customer visit ya call karne se pehle online check karta hai. Website trust, services, reviews, gallery and contact journey clear karti hai.

q: AI search-ready website kya hoti hai?
a: Aisi website jisme SEO, FAQ, schema, clear entity information, case studies and trust signals hote hain so search engines and AI systems can understand it better.
